latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC1 — 💨 속도: X.X displayed after character_preview received
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _populate_preview() calls _update_class_guide(d.get('class','')) which sets _guide_spd_lbl.text = '💨 속도: %.1f' % cd['spd'] for known classes

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC2 — class description with autowrap displayed in preview panel
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _guide_desc_lbl created with autowrap_mode = TextServer.AUTOWRAP_WORD_SMART; cd['desc'] assigned in _update_class_guide()

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC3 — unknown class key handled without crash
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _update_class_guide() opens with 'if not CLASS_DATA.has(cls)' guard → sets both labels to '' and returns early

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC4 — existing character creation flow unchanged
latestValidationChecks.evidence: No existing lines removed; _populate_preview() only gains one appended call; _build_ui(), WS handler, and save flow untouched

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC5 — TEXT_SECONDARY colour and _apply_font() applied to guide labels
latestValidationChecks.evidence: Both _guide_spd_lbl and _guide_desc_lbl have modulate = TEXT_SECONDARY and _apply_font() called before pvbox.add_child()
